evan mobley.detail: Played 36 minutes, no injury or restriction flags; missed PTS over 10 with 9 points on cold shooting
evan mobley.web_narrative: Mobley finished with 9 points in 36 minutes of normal playing time, falling one point short of the over. No injury or external factor explains the miss; it was simply an off shooting night in a game where Cleveland's offense struggled overall.

james harden.detail: Played 37 minutes, no injury flagged; missed AST over 4 with only 3 assists on a poor overall performance
james harden.web_narrative: Harden had a lackluster Game 2, finishing with just 3 assists in 37 minutes while shooting 3-for-13 from the field and committing four turnovers. No injury was reported; he simply had an ineffective game in which Detroit's defense limited his playmaking opportunities.
